product-marketing.d: The foundation every other skill reads first — positioning, audience, product context.

seo-audit.d: Audit, review, and diagnose SEO issues across your site.

ai-seo.d: Optimize for AI search and LLM citations — AEO / GEO / answer engines.

site-architecture.d: Plan page hierarchy, navigation, URL structure, and internal linking.

programmatic-seo.d: Create SEO-driven pages at scale using templates and data.

schema.d: Add, fix, and optimize schema markup and structured data.

content-strategy.d: Plan what to write — topic clusters, pillars, editorial calendar.

aso.d: Audit and optimize App Store and Google Play listings.

cro.d: Increase conversions on landing, pricing, and feature pages and forms.

signup.d: Optimize signup, registration, and trial activation flows.

onboarding.d: Improve post-signup activation, first-run, and time-to-value.

popups.d: Create and optimize popups, modals, overlays, and banners.

paywalls.d: Design in-app paywalls, upgrade screens, and feature gates.

offers.d: Design promotional offers, discounts, and incentives that convert.

copywriting.d: Write and rewrite marketing copy for any page.

copy-editing.d: Edit, polish, and refresh existing marketing copy.

cold-email.d: B2B cold outreach and follow-up sequences that get replies.

emails.d: Build email sequences, drip campaigns, and lifecycle flows.

social.d: Create, schedule, and optimize social content across platforms.

video.d: Produce video with AI tools and programmatic frameworks.

image.d: Generate and optimize marketing images and graphics.

sms.d: Plan SMS / MMS flows — welcome, cart, post-purchase, win-back.

ads.d: Plan paid campaigns on Google, Meta, LinkedIn, and X.

ad-creative.d: Generate, iterate, and scale ad creative at volume.

ab-testing.d: Design A/B tests and build an experimentation program.

analytics.d: Set up, audit, and improve tracking and measurement.

referrals.d: Build referral, affiliate, and word-of-mouth programs.

free-tools.d: Plan and build free tools for lead gen and SEO value.

churn-prevention.d: Reduce churn — save offers, dunning, win-back, retention.

community-marketing.d: Build and grow communities for community-led growth.

lead-magnets.d: Create gated content and lead magnets for email capture.

co-marketing.d: Find partners and plan joint, cross-promotional campaigns.

revops.d: Revenue ops, lead lifecycle, and marketing-to-sales handoff.

sales-enablement.d: Build sales collateral, decks, and objection handling.

competitors.d: Create comparison and "alternative to" landing pages.

competitor-profiling.d: Research and profile competitors from their URLs.

directory-submissions.d: Submit to startup, SaaS, AI, and review directories.

prospecting.d: Find, qualify, and build B2B prospect lists.

public-relations.d: Earned media, press coverage, and journalist outreach.

marketing-ideas.d: Generate marketing ideas, inspiration, and growth strategies.

marketing-psychology.d: Apply behavioral science and mental models to marketing.

customer-research.d: Conduct and synthesize customer research and voice-of-customer.

marketing-plan.d: Generate a comprehensive AARRR-structured marketing plan.
